specs.title: AUTH-01: Register a new user via API
AUTH-02: Login with registered user via API
AUTH-03: Verify token via API
AUTH-04: Reject invalid token
AUTH-05: Reject duplicate email registration via API
AUTH-07: Login via UI
AUTH-08: Register via UI
AUTH-09: Show error on wrong password via UI
AUTH-10: Show error on empty fields via UI

AUTH-13: Token persists across page reload
SES-11: Session ID persists in localStorage after sending a message
HIST-02: Conversation history endpoint returns data after login and conversation
HIST-07: Conversation auto-saves after messages - conversations list is non-empty
TTS-06: TTSButton component renders on assistant messages
TTS-07: TTS button has correct label - Listen to Full Response
PROD-10: Product display component exists in code (partial test)
STRM-06: Streaming typewriter effect - streaming-cursor class appears during response
STRM-07: Streaming response completes - cursor disappears and full text remains
EDGE-15: Long message handling - 500+ character message sent successfully
UI-06: Chat interface loads after authentication
UI-07: Empty state shows welcome cards
UI-08: Chat input accepts text
UI-09: Send button disabled when input is empty
UI-10: Send message and get response
UI-11: User message styled correctly (right-aligned with orange gradient)
UI-12: Assistant message styled correctly (left-aligned with white bg)
UI-13: New Session button clears chat
UI-14: Phase indicator visible after first message
UI-15: Chat input disabled while processing
UI-28: Thumbs up button visible on assistant message
UI-29: Thumbs down button visible on assistant message
UI-30: Clicking thumbs up changes button style to green
UI-31: Clicking thumbs down changes button style to red
UI-32: Feedback persists - thumbs up stays green after clicking
UI-01: Login page renders correctly
UI-02: Password visibility toggle works
UI-03: Register mode toggle
UI-04: Registration step indicator shows
UI-05: Login form validation - submit empty form shows error
UI-16: Phase indicator starts in Listening phase after first message
UI-17: Turn count display present after each message
UI-18: Phase indicator is compact (not full-width)
UI-19: Sidebar toggle button visible in header
UI-20: Clicking sidebar toggle opens sidebar - Conversations heading appears
UI-21: Clicking toggle again closes sidebar
UI-22: Sidebar shows New Session button
UI-23: Sidebar shows user name at bottom
UI-24: New Session in sidebar clears current chat
UI-25: Conversation history appears in sidebar after exchanging messages
UI-26: Mobile responsive - sidebar starts hidden at 375x812
UI-27: Desktop responsive - toggle works at 1280x800
